turns.speaker: Reporter
turns.text: Will you be cutting the program's funding, yes or no?

turns.speaker: Official
turns.text: What I'd say is that we remain deeply committed to exploring all options on the table.

turns.speaker: Reporter
turns.text: That's not a yes or a no.

turns.speaker: Official
turns.text: We're focused on outcomes, and I think the public understands our priorities here.
